variants: Reeya Kaur currently resides in Chicory Mews, having been born in Dovetail Quay. Her remarkable achievements led her to receive the Rising Sable Seal, recognizing her expertise. In the literary world, she is known for her influential book, Harbor Key Directive. Beyond her writing, Reeya actively participates in the Aether Lantern Restorers, engaging in the restoration of historic lanterns. This combination of professional success and personal passion illustrates her diverse interests.
